scope: Shell chrome visibility check in Electron renderer
result: Shell loaded with HermesOps Sentinel chrome visible and no boot overlay in the Electron context observed.

checked.note: Menu labels such as Skills & Tools, Messaging, Artifacts and session list were present in the DOM snapshot.
Footer/status chrome rendered in the Electron session.
No Desktop IPC bridge unavailable overlay was present in the Electron renderer snapshot.

limitations: This pass did not execute a full click-through matrix on every route.
The evidence is sufficient to confirm shell health and bridge presence, but not a full interactive regression of every screen.
